title: The Spirit of freedom is Born of the Mountains.
content:
The spirit of freedom is born of the mountains,
    In gorge and in ca�on it hovers and dwells;
    Pervading the torrents and crystalline fountains,
        Which dash through the valleys and forest clad dells.

    The spirit of freedom, so firm and impliant,
        Is borne on the breeze, whose invisible waves
    Descend from the mountain peaks, stern and defiant--
        Created for freemen, but never for slaves.
meaning:
Alfred Castner King's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Spirit of freedom is Born of the Mountains."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
